name: Uttarakhand 2016
description: Harish Rawat's INC navigates Uttarakhand's tumultuous floor-crossing crisis and Presidential Rule overturned by the HC.

publicState.memoryHint: Mamata's second sweeping win confirms TMC's dominance; Left Front and INC together barely hold 10% of the vote.

name: West Bengal 2000
description: Fictionalized Indian state scenario inspired by long incumbency, organized cadre politics, rural unrest, and a rising opposition mood.

publicState.memoryHint: Voters remember long incumbency, but the opposition still needs credibility.

name: Andhra Pradesh 2021
description: Jagan Reddy's YSRCP commands AP on its historic 2019 mandate — welfare schemes, decentralised capitals, and TDP's distant opposition.

publicState.memoryHint: Jagan's welfare-first governance enjoys mass rural loyalty; three-capital controversy tests his credibility with urban AP.

name: Arunachal Pradesh 2021
description: Pema Khandu's BJP consolidates Arunachal's northeast frontier — border infrastructure, Modi wave, and a fragmented opposition.

publicState.memoryHint: BJP's Arunachal grip is firm; China's incursion claims put border infrastructure at the top of the political agenda.

name: Assam 2021
description: Sarbananda Sonowal's BJP completes Assam's first full term as NRC implementation, CAA protests, and Covid define the election.

publicState.memoryHint: BJP holds Assam on development and NRC nationalism; INC's Mahajot alliance gives it a credible path back to power.

name: Bihar 2021
description: Nitish Kumar's razor-thin NDA win in Bihar masks the RJD surge — Tejashwi's youth campaign reshapes Bihar's political landscape.

publicState.memoryHint: Nitish governs but RJD's Tejashwi took 75 seats alone — Bihar's political centre of gravity is shifting to the young.

name: Chhattisgarh 2021
description: Bhupesh Baghel's INC mid-term delivers farmer debt waiver and tribal welfare after ending BJP's 15-year Chhattisgarh rule.

publicState.memoryHint: Baghel's INC has delivered on farm debt waiver and welfare; BJP's Raman Singh is out of fresh ideas post-15-year rule.

name: Delhi 2021
description: Kejriwal's AAP governs Delhi on its second massive mandate — mohalla clinics, education transformation, and Covid oxygen crisis ahead.

publicState.memoryHint: AAP's welfare delivery model is nationally admired; the April 2021 oxygen crisis will test Kejriwal's governance reputation.

name: Goa 2021
description: Pramod Sawant's BJP governs post-Parrikar Goa as INC, AAP, and TMC crowd the 2022 election space in a fragmented contest.

publicState.memoryHint: Sawant governs in Parrikar's long shadow; Covid devastates Goa's tourism economy while opposition parties multiply.

name: Gujarat 2021
description: Vijay Rupani's BJP navigates Gujarat's bruising Covid second wave ahead of a leadership refresh and 2022 state election.

publicState.memoryHint: Gujarat BJP faces rare public anger over Covid oxygen shortages; Rupani's replacement by Patel signals internal refresh ahead of 2022.

name: Haryana 2021
description: ML Khattar's BJP-JJP coalition bears the brunt of Haryana farmers' anger over the three farm laws at Delhi's gates.

publicState.memoryHint: Farm law protests devastate BJP's rural Haryana base; Hooda's INC is the natural beneficiary of a deeply agitated farmer vote.

name: Himachal Pradesh 2021
description: Jai Ram Thakur's BJP navigates HP mid-term with Covid relief as Virbhadra Singh's INC prepares its final electoral battle.

publicState.memoryHint: Thakur's BJP performs adequately in mid-term; Virbhadra Singh's passing later in 2021 reshapes INC's HP leadership entirely.

name: Jammu & Kashmir 2021
description: J&K under LG administration post-Art 370 — NC and PDP demand statehood restoration while BJP consolidates its direct administration.

publicState.memoryHint: J&K's UT status removes elected governance; NC and PDP demand statehood while BJP pursues a Jammu-centric development narrative.

name: Jharkhand 2021
description: Hemant Soren's JMM Mahagathbandhan delivers Jharkhand's most stable government — tribal rights, MNREGA boost, and BJP's reset.

publicState.memoryHint: Hemant Soren's coalition is the most secure Jharkhand government ever; BJP rebuilds under Babulal Marandi after a crushing 2019 loss.

name: Karnataka 2021
description: BS Yediyurappa's BJP governs Karnataka amid corruption allegations as INC's Siddaramaiah-DKS duo builds a credible 2023 campaign.

publicState.memoryHint: Yediyurappa's advanced age and corruption perception hurt BJP; Siddaramaiah and DKS unite INC for a formidable 2023 comeback.

name: Kerala 2021
description: Pinarayi Vijayan's LDF shatters Kerala's alternation tradition — development delivery, Covid response, and Chennithala's UDF challenge.

publicState.memoryHint: Pinarayi's disciplined Covid response earns rare Kerala incumbency win; UDF's Chennithala campaigns hard but faces the anti-alternation tide.

name: Madhya Pradesh 2021
description: Shivraj Singh Chouhan's BJP reclaims MP through Operation Lotus — a politically engineered comeback that shook national politics.

publicState.memoryHint: Shivraj's return via Scindia defections gives BJP MP but INC's Kamal Nath keeps the government under moral legitimacy pressure.

name: Maharashtra 2021
description: Uddhav Thackeray's MVA coalition manages India's hardest-hit Covid state — Mumbai under siege, Fadnavis in potent opposition.

publicState.memoryHint: Uddhav's MVA handles Maharashtra's Covid crisis under enormous pressure; BJP's Fadnavis waits for coalition fault lines to widen.

name: Manipur 2021
description: N. Biren Singh's BJP builds Manipur mid-term on development, AFSPA review debate, and northeast connectivity ahead of 2022 polls.

publicState.memoryHint: Biren Singh's BJP governs Manipur competently; AFSPA review and connectivity projects are key issues heading to 2022 polls.

name: Meghalaya 2021
description: Conrad Sangma's NPP-led MDA coalition governs Meghalaya mid-term — coal mining ban, Covid, and a historic non-INC governance era.

publicState.memoryHint: Conrad Sangma's NPP brings fresh governance energy to Meghalaya; INC struggles to remain relevant after losing its northeast dominance.

name: Mizoram 2021
description: Zoramthanga's MNF governs Mizoram mid-term as ZPM emerges as a powerful new challenger, reshaping Mizoram's two-party dynamics.

publicState.memoryHint: Zoramthanga's MNF governs amid Mizoram's Myanmar refugee solidarity stance; ZPM's clean-image challenge is building rapidly.

name: Nagaland 2021
description: Neiphiu Rio's NDPP-BJP coalition steers Nagaland through NSCN peace-talk urgency and a Covid-hit development agenda.

publicState.memoryHint: Rio's NDPP-BJP holds Nagaland with a shared tribal-development mandate; the delayed NSCN final accord tests political patience.

name: Odisha 2021
description: Naveen Patnaik's BJD enters a fifth consecutive mandate commanding Odisha's politics with welfare schemes and disaster resilience.

publicState.memoryHint: Naveen's BJD is near-unbeatable — five terms of welfare delivery make Odisha's anti-incumbency nearly non-existent.

name: Punjab 2021
description: Amarinder Singh's INC walks a tightrope — supporting farmers' protest while managing Centre relations as AAP builds Punjab momentum.

publicState.memoryHint: Amarinder's INC is squeezed between the Centre and an angry farmer vote; AAP's Bhagwant Mann is becoming Punjab's defining political voice.

name: Rajasthan 2021
description: Ashok Gehlot's INC stabilises post-Pilot rebellion Rajasthan — social welfare delivery, Covid management, and a BJP in internal disarray.

publicState.memoryHint: Gehlot's political skill saved INC from collapse; Vasundhara Raje battles BJP's internal resistance to her Rajasthan leadership.

name: Sikkim 2021
description: Prem Singh Tamang's SKM consolidates Sikkim's new political era after ending Chamling's 25-year SDF dominance.

publicState.memoryHint: Golay's SKM has delivered a genuine political alternation in Sikkim; Chamling's SDF adjusts to an unfamiliar opposition role.

name: Tamil Nadu 2021
description: Edappadi Palaniswami's AIADMK heads into its 2021 election defence hobbled by post-Jaya identity crisis and Stalin's dominant DMK wave.

publicState.memoryHint: AIADMK's post-Jaya era lacks a towering figure; MK Stalin's patient decade-long groundwork makes DMK the clear 2021 favourite.

name: Telangana 2021
description: KCR's TRS commands Telangana mid-term as BJP launches an aggressive state expansion and INC continues its post-bifurcation collapse.

publicState.memoryHint: KCR's welfare schemes cement TRS loyalty; BJP's rapid Telangana growth makes it the primary challenger, displacing INC entirely.

name: Tripura 2021
description: Biplab Kumar Deb's BJP mid-term in Tripura faces post-Left transition challenges — violence, governance gaps, and Manik Sarkar's resilient opposition.

publicState.memoryHint: Biplab Deb's BJP governs a post-Left Tripura but political violence and governance quality concerns complicate the transition.

name: Uttarakhand 2021
description: Trivendra Singh Rawat's BJP faces mid-term leadership turbulence in Uttarakhand — a year with three CMs ahead of the 2022 election.

publicState.memoryHint: BJP's three CMs in 2021 signals internal chaos; INC's Harish Rawat positions himself for 2022 as the change narrative builds.

name: Uttar Pradesh 2021
description: Yogi Adityanath's BJP defends India's most important state — law-order, Hindutva identity, and the devastating Covid second wave image.

publicState.memoryHint: Yogi's BJP defends a massive mandate but Ganga bodies and oxygen shortage images haunt 2021; Akhilesh's SP builds a united caste coalition.

name: West Bengal 2021
description: Mamata Banerjee's TMC faces BJP's most aggressive state campaign — a do-or-die Bengal battle with massive national stakes for both parties.

mainIssues: Sonar Bangla vs Jai Shri Ram
publicState.memoryHint: Bengal 2021 is India's most electrifying contest; Mamata's regional identity versus BJP's Modi wave will define Bengali politics for a decade.
